name: fleet-post-canary-waves
title: Run post-canary fleet refreshes in controlled waves
description: Preserve sequential canary safety while allowing independent post-canary consumer install, validation, PR, and CI work to overlap in bounded, resumable rollout waves.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Telemetry and release-identity dependencies are complete. The source change adds orchestration policy and scheduling contracts; it does not itself mutate consumer repositories.
